title: LWX Test Games
_comment: Default collection. Every cartridge here is a CC0 game we BUILD and SHIP (see games/ + scripts/make-*.mjs), so all of them boot out of the box with no downloads. Homebrew/PD pointers that need a manual download were moved to roms/homebrew.collection.json (load with ?collection=roms/homebrew.collection.json) so the default room never shows a cartridge that 404s. No commercial ROMs or BIOS here. See README.md.

cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (generated by scripts/make-c64-demo.mjs)

cartridges.title: LWX Pong
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/nes-pong, built with cc65 + neslib; see scripts/make-nes-pong.mjs).

cartridges.title: LWX Bomberman
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/nes-bomberman, built with cc65 + neslib; see scripts/make-nes-bomberman.mjs). Up to 4 players (Four Score): D-pad moves, A drops a bomb; power-ups under bricks; last one standing wins.

cartridges.title: LWX Zap Gallery
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/nes-gallery, built with cc65 + neslib; see scripts/make-nes-gallery.mjs). NES Zapper light-gun shooting gallery — grab the gun, shoot the bullseye for points (faster each hit); shooting the dark field or letting a target time out is a miss, 3 misses ends it. Boots with the Zapper on port 2. 2-player co-op: from the title, Zapper trigger = 1P; port-1 START = 2P shared-gun (alternating turns, one Zapper); a port-1 fire (2nd gun) = 2P duel (P1 on port 1, P2 on the Zapper) — duel's simultaneous two-gun aim awaits the multiport core.

cartridges.title: LWX Frontline Fury (NES)
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/nes-opwolf, built with cc65 + neslib; see scripts/make-nes-opwolf.mjs). NES-native Operation-Wolf-style on-rails wave shooter — soldiers march toward the front line; only the frontmost one is ever lit (the real Zapper has no aim position, only a light/trigger bit, so at most one target can ever be shootable), shoot it to score, shoot while nothing is lit to reload. Clear each stage's quota before health runs out. Boots with the Zapper on port 2. 2-player: from the title, Zapper trigger = 1P; port-1 START = 2P shared-gun (alternating turns, hand off at stage-clear); port-1 A = 2P duel (P1 fires with pad A, P2 with the Zapper, against the same shared target).

cartridges.title: LWX SNES Demo
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/snes-demo, built with PVSnesLib 4.5.0; see scripts/make-snes-demo.mjs). LoROM 256K.

cartridges.title: LWX Scope Range
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/snes-scope, built with PVSnesLib + a generated CC0 sprite sheet; see scripts/make-snes-scope.mjs). SNES Super Scope shooting gallery — grab the Super Scope, shoot the centre dot to calibrate aim, then hit the bullseye targets for points (faster each hit); shooting the dark field or letting a target time out is a miss, 3 misses ends it. Boots with the Super Scope on port 2.

cartridges.title: LWX Frontline Fury
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/snes-opwolf, built with PVSnesLib + a generated CC0 sprite sheet; see scripts/make-snes-opwolf.mjs). Original CC0 Operation-Wolf-style on-rails two-gun shooter — advance through stages of enemy soldiers, drop them with the gun before they reach the front line, shoot OFF-screen to reload. Two-player co-op via the Konami Justifier (two guns on port 2: device 516 gun 1 / 772 gun 2). Falls back to a single Super Scope (device 260) when no Justifier is attached. Shoot the centre to calibrate + start.

cartridges.title: LWX Paint (GBA)
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/gba-paint, built with devkitARM + libtonc Mode 3; see scripts/make-gba-paint.mjs)

cartridges.title: LWX VB Demo
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/vb-demo, built with VUEngine ves-v0.6.0; see scripts/make-vb-demo.mjs). Move a box with the D-pad; A/B change stereo depth.

cartridges.title: LWX Amiga Demo
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (boot-block 68k intro in scripts/amiga-bootblock.s, packed by scripts/make-amiga-demo.mjs). Boots on PUAE's built-in AROS; cycles the background colour.

cartridges.title: LWX GunCon Range
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/ps2-guncon-range, built with the PS2SDK ps2dev/ps2dev toolchain + a real USB LDD GunCon2 driver; see scripts/make-ps2-guncon-range.mjs). GunCon2 shooting gallery — aim and pull the trigger to hit the target box; 5 misses resets score.

cartridges.title: LWX N64 Smoke Test
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/n64-smoke, built with libdragon via the anacierdem/libdragon Docker toolchain; see scripts/make-n64-smoke.mjs and docs/N64_CORE_BUILD.md). No gameplay — a continuously shifting solid-color fill with a text overlay, used as the boot smoke test for the mupen64plus_next core (Phase N0 of docs/research/n64-wasm-jit-plan.md).

cartridges.title: LWX N64 Orbit Cubes
cartridges.credits: LibretroWebXR (game in games/n64-scene, built with libdragon via the anacierdem/libdragon Docker toolchain; see scripts/make-n64-scene.mjs and docs/N64_CORE_BUILD.md). A rotating flat-shaded cube (real perspective-projected 3D, not a flat fill) — analog stick drives yaw/pitch, a persistent EEPROM boot counter, and a continuous generated tone through the audio HLE path. Stands in for a commercial 3D title for Phase N0 fps measurement (docs/research/n64-wasm-jit-plan.md) since no commercial N64 ROM is available or sourced for this repo.
